evals.prompt: I have a stock screener with a search input and sector/market filters. When users select a filter, the API should receive the values, but nothing happens. The inputs have IDs but no name attributes. Fix this.
evals.expected_output: Explain why name attributes are required for HTMX, provide corrected HTML with proper name attributes on all form inputs.

evals.prompt: Build an email validation form with HTMX. User types email → server validates → shows error or success message inline. Include both client and server code.
evals.expected_output: Complete form HTML with HTMX validation, TypeScript server endpoint, error/success response patterns.

evals.prompt: Create a contact form with multiple validation rules: email format, phone number (digits only), message length (min 10 chars). Show errors below each field in real-time.
evals.expected_output: Form HTML with field-level validation, server-side validation logic, inline error display with DaisyUI styling.
